prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 4SN-BLE-UTENSILSET-BOTL Product Type: BOTTLE_OPENER Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille Kitchen Gadget Pastel Bottle Opener Wooden Handle Cooking Tool Home Goods Description: This fresh and fun bottle opener from Beille is a must-have kitchen accessory featuring a modern design with a thick rounded handle to ensure comfortable maneuvering during food and meal prep.

The unique 3-way bottle opener is a handy item to have for any kitchen. It will open just about any pull-tab can, bottle, or food pan, making this a super-convenient all-in-one option. It features a stylish pastel color for a trendy look, perfect for any farmhouse, country, or modern-themed kitchen.

Each bottle opener is made of durable, high-quality plastic with a sturdy wooden handle, and the tools are dishwasher-safe for easy cleanup. It's made of food-safe materials so you can trust it whether you're meal-prepping or hosting a party. The handle also comes with a convenient hole for hanging storage if desired. Search Terms: cooking baking utensil wooden silicone food prep college essentials house warming gifts home chef kitchen decor cookware sets bakeware organization first beverage pantry storage Features: - 3-WAY BOTTLE OPENER - Beille bottle opener will open just about any bottle or cap top with a unique 3-way design; Designed to open aluminum soda cans, drink bottles, and standard cans alike; Must have kitchen tool - TRENDY STYLE - Bottle opener features a stylish soft pastel and light wooden handle for a trendy look; Perfect fit for any modern, farmhouse, or country-style kitchen; Great housewarming gift idea - DURABLE DESIGN - Each kitchen gadget is made of durable, high-quality silicone and stainless steel with a sturdy wooden handle; Tools are dishwasher safe for easy clean up after use - FOOD SAFE - Beille bottle opener is made of food-safe materials so you can trust it for use in your kitchen, meal prep, or at backyard BBQs and parties; Tool handle features a convenient hole for hanging storage if desired - SPECIFICATIONS - Dimensions: 6.75" x 1"; Weight: .15oz; Materials: wood, plastic, stainless steel; Food safe: Yes; Color: pastel blue === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
